disambiguated.context: Both Helen and Michael were up for a promotion at work, though both had recently had to take a leave of absence. Helen was now fully back and planned to put work first to get caught up, but Michael was considering moving to part-time to help take care of a very ill parent.
disambiguated.question: Who is most focused on their work?
